title: Replication package for ICSA26 paper: Architecture in the Cradle: Early Prevention of Architectural Decay with ArchGuard
description: Replication package for ICSA26 paper: Architecture in the Cradle: Early Prevention of Architectural Decay with ArchGuard. This framework analyzes software issue reports to find those that are inducing architectural smells. Based on the analysis, it trains models that can classify unseen issues using three complementary machine learning approaches: traditional ML, RoBERTa fine-tuning, and zero-shot LLM classification. See README.md for details.
notes: This work was funded by the Topic Engineering Secure Systems of the Helmholtz Association (HGF) and by the Deutsche Forschungsgemeinschaft (DFG, German Research Foundation) under the National Research Data Infrastructure -- NFDI 52/1 -- project number 501930651, NFDIxCS and under - SFB 1608 - 501798263. It was also supported by funding from the pilot program Core Informatics at KIT (KiKIT) of the Helmholtz Association (HGF) and by KASTEL Security Research Labs.
